raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/19, I called Citi to indicate fraud on my account in the amount of about $ XXXX for fraudulent XXXX charges from XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX. I was told that the fraud team will investigate within two billing cycles ; however, they will not credit my account. I have a payment coming due and its still showing that I owe money on fraudulent charges. I called four times to request credits to my account during the investigation, but call center staff ignores question. They just closed my card and reissued a new one. In addition, XXXX charges that were pending which I indicated were fraud were still allowed to go through even with my card being locked.
